case_title: MILAGRO AVALOS VS. VINICIO DE LEON

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALOS, MILAGRO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2012 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-31-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS NOT REQUIRED TO BE SERVED AGAIN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--ELLEN ROSENTHAL. SPANISH INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR THE PLAINTIFF AT THE NEXT HEARING.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY AVALOS, MILAGRO AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON, VINICIO DBA TRANSPORTES DE LEON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--SHERRY J. MCADAM. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALOS, MILAGRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LEON, VINICIO DBA TRANSPORTES DE LEON $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO VINICIO DE LEON-RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD
